assignment: audit bundle schema gaps for adopted consensus/source_refs
summary: Commander bundle schema in agents/stampede-commander.agent.md lacks explicit adopted-consensus item_id list and bundle-level source_refs, while runtime launcher prompt expects both.
Monitor/tests do not enforce bundle adoption/source_refs, increasing risk of inconsistent outputs and lost traceability to collab ledger records.

evidence.note: bundle schema includes consensus summary but no adopted IDs or source_refs
commander prompt asks to include adopted consensus item_ids and source_refs in bundle.json
monitor counts collab JSONL lines only

gaps: No canonical field name for adopted consensus references in bundle.
No specified placement/shape for source_refs in bundle (top-level vs per item).
Ambiguity between consensus summary object and adopted consensus IDs from collab ledger.
recommendations: Define explicit bundle fields (e.g., adopted_consensus_item_ids: string[], source_refs: string[] or object).
Align agent spec schema with launcher prompt/protocol; add validation hook at bundle write/monitor stage.
